archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Admin, Premium Fintech Variant for User
design_strategy: The goal is to differentiate the User and Admin experiences completely, moving away from the generic 'sidebar + cards' template. The User Dashboard will feel like a premium, modern consumer fintech app (e.g., Apple Card, high-end wealth management) utilizing a Top Navigation and an asymmetrical 'Bento' grid with generous spacing and soft glassmorphism. The Admin Dashboard will adopt a strict 'Control Room' Swiss brutalist design—dense, high-contrast, border-heavy, with no shadows—optimizing for data scanning and fast actions.

global_rules.spacing: Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) for User Dashboard. Use tight, dense spacing (p-4) for Admin.
global_rules.accessibility: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based). Ensure min 4.5:1 contrast for text.
global_rules.animations: Framer Motion for subtle enter animations. Admin: purely instant/functional transitions. User: fluid springs for hover and entry.

surfaces.cards: rounded-3xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm bg-white p-6 or p-8
surfaces.navigation: Top navigation layout (no sidebar). Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm

elements.wallet_card: col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2. Use absolute positioning for background image with bg-black/40 overlay. Large white typography for Total Balances (Main + E-Wallet).
elements.quick_actions: col-span-full flex flex-wrap gap-4. Pill-shaped buttons (rounded-full) for Recharge, Add Fund, Withdrawal, etc.
elements.income_stats: col-span-full md:col-span-4 row-span-1 cards showing Total/Today/Repurchase income.
elements.referral_code: col-span-full md:col-span-4 flex items-center justify-between p-6 rounded-2xl bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-100.
elements.recent_transactions: col-span-full md:col-span-4 row-span-3. Tall list, tight item spacing.

surfaces.cards: rounded-none border border-zinc-200 bg-white p-4. No shadows.
surfaces.tables: border-collapse style. border-b border-zinc-200 on rows, hover:bg-zinc-50.

elements.overview_stats: 4 cards across the top (col-span-1 each) for Total Users, Main Wallet, E-Wallet, Pending Requests. Use a thick top border (e.g., border-t-4 border-zinc-950) for emphasis.
elements.fund_requests: col-span-full md:col-span-3 row-span-2. Dense Shadcn Data Table with inline 'Approve/Reject' ghost buttons.
elements.user_management: col-span-full md:col-span-1 row-span-2. Compact list of recently joined users.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts in standard index.html or global css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cabinet+Grotesk:wght@400;700;900&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap'); (Note: use appropriate CDNs for Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi, or fallback to system sans-serif if unavailable).
Ensure both dashboards are completely distinct components and layouts. User Dashboard must have a top navigation bar (no sidebar). Admin Dashboard must use a sidebar.

For the User Dashboard wallet card, use the 'wallet_bg_texture' as a background image with absolute positioning, `object-cover`, and an overlay of `bg-slate-900/60` to ensure white text is highly readable.

Do NOT use the generic 'Card' component from Shadcn out of the box without customizing the radius and borders per dashboard. Admin gets sharp corners (rounded-none), User gets soft corners (rounded-3xl).
Implement data-testid on all interactive elements: e.g., 'data-testid="copy-referral-button"', 'data-testid="approve-fund-button"'.
Use standard Tailwind classes for layout grids. For user dashboard quick actions, do not use a grid; use a flex-wrap container with `gap-4` to let pill-buttons flow naturally.
Do not build tables from scratch; use the Shadcn UI Table component, customized to match the Swiss Brutalist look for Admin (remove rounded corners on the table wrapper).
